---
title: Sunwoo Kwak
linestretch: 2
---

### About Me

I am currently a Master's student in Political Science at **Yonsei University** (Seoul, South Korea). I will be joining **Princeton University** as a Ph.D. student in the Department of Politics, starting in August 2026.

My research interests include **American Politics**, **Congress**, **Comparative Legislative Studies**, **Elections**, and **Public Opinion**.

So far, my research has been published in *Legislative Studies Quarterly*, as well as in journals in Korean.

### CV
- [click this link to download my CV](cv.html)

### Contacts
- Email: [sunwookwak@yonsei.ac.kr](mailto:sunwookwak@yonsei.ac.kr) or [sk2195@princeton.edu](mailto:sk2195@princeton.edu)
- Google Scholar: [Sunwoo Kwak](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=c22rzSYAAAAJ&hl=en)
